name: example-html-ppt-zhangzara-broadside
title: Html Ppt Zhangzara Broadside
description: Broadside — Dark editorial canvas with a single fire orange accent and bilingual Latin/Chinese type stack. Anything that should land like a broadside newspaper headline: brand manifestos, magazine and cultural pitches, design talks, bilingual EN/CN decks, founder vision statements.
